note: Tempdoc 559 Authority I — the catalog the layout-purity gate projects its position:fixed exemptions from (so the gate is catalog-projected per 548 §5.2, not a hardcoded list in the script). Every viewport overlay docks into an OverlayHost slot and drops its own positioning; the ONLY components allowed a free `position: fixed` are the OverlayHost itself + the genuinely-different positioning CLASSES below — they self-position relative to a trigger/cursor (anchored), the native dialog top layer or a dynamically-instantiated modal (dialog), or their instantiation site (toast). This is a semantic taxonomy, NOT a migration backlog: a NEW viewport-docked overlay must dock into a slot; only a genuinely-different positioning class is added here, with its class. Modeled on governance/execution-surfaces.v1.json.

classes.anchored: Positioned relative to a trigger element / cursor by JS (popovers, menus, hover cards). The OverlayHost slots are fixed viewport anchors and deliberately do not own trigger-relative positioning.
classes.dialog: Native <dialog> top layer or a dynamically-instantiated modal that is not a Shell-mounted OverlayHost child.
classes.toast: Dynamically-instantiated transient positioned at its instantiation site (not the Shell-mounted advisory toast host).
